seo.title: Meri Medicines — Your Trusted Neighbourhood Pharmacy
seo.description: Meri Medicines is your friendly neighbourhood pharmacy — authentic medicines, caring licensed pharmacists, free home delivery and easy prescription refills, close to home.

hero.headline: Meri Medicines. Meri Pharmacy.
hero.tagline: Authentic medicines, a pharmacist who knows you by name, and free same-day delivery to your door — that is Meri Medicines.

slides.caption: Free, same-day, right to your door
A friendly face who remembers you

meta.label: Families who trust us with their care

about.description: Meri Medicines began with a simple belief: a pharmacy should feel like family. We are your neighbourhood chemist — stocking authentic, affordable medicines, remembering your refills, and delivering to your door, all with the warmth of a place that genuinely cares. No queues, no confusion, just honest advice from pharmacists who know you.
about.lede: We are more than a counter. Meri Medicines is the neighbour you can lean on for genuine medicine, gentle advice and a delivery that always shows up.

pillars.title: Always authentic
pillars.body: Every medicine is sourced from licensed distributors and stored with care — only genuine, in-date stock ever reaches your hands.

pillars.title: Free home delivery
pillars.body: Order in a message or a call and we deliver to your door the same day — usually within the hour for nearby homes.

pillars.title: A pharmacist who cares
pillars.body: Our licensed pharmacists check every order, answer your questions patiently, and remember your family's regular refills.

services.title: In-Store Pharmacy
services.description: Walk in for authentic prescription and OTC medicines, dispensed by a licensed pharmacist who takes the time to help.

services.title: Free Home Delivery
services.description: Send your order by call or message and we deliver to your door the same day — free for homes in the neighbourhood.

services.title: Prescription Refills
services.description: We remember your regular medicines and remind you before they run out, so your refills are ready when you need them.

services.title: Wellness & OTC
services.description: Vitamins, baby care, personal care and everyday health essentials — curated and quality-checked for your family.

data.descriptor: Order in a tap · chat with your pharmacist · track delivery

data.headline: Small pharmacy, big-hearted care.
data.descriptor: The little things that make Meri Medicines feel like your own.

data.lede: The composition is identical, yet prices vary brand to brand. Our pharmacists help you find the best-value option for every prescription.

videoCopy.headline: How we find your best-value option

parts.text: We treat every customer like a

departments.label: Pharmacists
departments.detail: Qualified and friendly — every order checked, every question answered.

departments.label: Delivery riders
departments.detail: Reliable faces who bring your medicines to the door, on time.

departments.label: Care team
departments.detail: We remember your refills and are a call away when you need us.

items.title: Genuine medicines, always
items.description: Sourced only from licensed distributors and stored with care — never grey-market, never expired.

items.title: Free same-day delivery
items.description: A call or message is all it takes; we deliver to nearby homes the same day, often within the hour.

items.title: Refills, remembered
items.description: We keep track of your regular medicines and remind you before they run out — no last-minute dashes.

items.title: Advice you can trust
items.description: Our licensed pharmacists take the time to explain dosage, interactions and safe use — patiently.

steps.title: Send us your order or prescription
steps.description: Call, message or walk in with your prescription — we'll confirm what you need from authentic, in-stock medicines.

steps.title: A pharmacist checks everything
steps.description: A licensed pharmacist reviews your order for dosage and safety before it's packed — every single time.

steps.title: Delivered free, or ready to collect
steps.description: We deliver to your door the same day at no charge, or have it ready for a quick pickup at the counter.

data.lede: Anything we missed? Just call or message — we love hearing from our neighbours.

items.question: Do you really deliver for free?
items.answer: Yes. Home delivery is free for homes in our neighbourhood, usually the same day and often within the hour. Just call or message us your order and a licensed pharmacist will take it from there.

items.question: Where do your medicines come from?
items.answer: Every medicine we stock is sourced from CDSCO-licensed manufacturers and distributors, stored properly, and checked for expiry. We never carry grey-market or unlicensed stock.

items.question: How do prescription medicines work?
items.answer: Prescription medicines are dispensed only against a valid prescription and reviewed by our in-house licensed pharmacist. Send a clear photo on WhatsApp or bring the original to the counter.

items.question: Can you remind me about my refills?
items.answer: Absolutely. Tell us your regular medicines and we'll keep track, reminding you before they run out so a refill is always ready when you need it.

items.question: How can I reach you?
items.answer: Call or message us at +91 22 4000 1200, or email care@merimedicines.in. We're open seven days a week, 9 am to 10 pm.

contact.address: Shop 4, Linking Road, Bandra West, Mumbai 400050

compliance.disclaimer: Meri Medicines Pharmacy Pvt. Ltd. is a licensed neighbourhood pharmacy. The information on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. All medicines are dispensed by licensed pharmacists in accordance with applicable Indian pharmaceutical regulations, and prescription medicines are dispensed only against a valid prescription. Consult a qualified medical practitioner before starting, stopping, or changing any medication.

stickyCta.text: Order on the Meri Medicines app.

footer.description: Your friendly neighbourhood pharmacy — authentic medicines, caring pharmacists and free home delivery.

contact.heading: Get in touch with Meri Medicines
contact.lede: Questions about a medicine, a refill, or a delivery? Call, message or write to us — your neighbourhood pharmacist is happy to help.

deactivateAccount.heading: Delete your Meri Medicines account
deactivateAccount.intro: We're sorry to see you go. You can deactivate your Meri Medicines account directly from the app in a few taps. Deactivation is permanent — your profile, order history and saved preferences will be removed and cannot be recovered.

video.caption: A short walkthrough of the in-app deactivation flow.

items: Open the Meri Medicines app on your phone.
Tap your profile icon at the bottom-right corner to open the menu.
Select the three dots next to the "Log Out" button.
Tap "Deactivate" to proceed with deleting your account.
Confirm the action when prompted. Your account will be queued for deletion immediately.

sections.heading: What happens after deactivation
body: Your profile, address book, saved prescriptions, and order history will be permanently removed from our active systems within seven business days.
Anonymised transaction records are retained for the period required by Indian pharmaceutical and tax regulations. These records cannot be linked back to your identity once deactivation is complete.
You will stop receiving any communications from Meri Medicines once deactivation is processed.

sections.heading: Need help instead?
body: If you ran into a problem with an order, a refund, or a prescription, our support team can usually resolve it without you needing to close your account. Reach out via the Contact page or write to support@merimedicines.in before deactivating.

disclaimer.heading: Disclaimer
body: Meri Medicines Pharmacy Pvt. Ltd. is a licensed pharmaceutical retail and fulfilment company. The information on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. All medicines are dispensed by licensed pharmacists in accordance with applicable Indian pharmaceutical regulations, and prescription medicines are dispensed only against a valid prescription. Consult a qualified medical practitioner before starting, stopping, or changing any medication.

The information presented on this website is provided in good faith for general informational purposes only. Meri Medicines makes no representation or warranty, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, adequacy, validity, reliability, availability, or completeness of any information on the site.

Any reliance you place on such information is strictly at your own risk. We will not be liable for any loss or damage incurred as a result of the use of this website or the information contained herein.

privacyPolicy.heading: Privacy Policy
body: This Privacy Policy ("Privacy Policy") outlines the information that Meri Medicines Pharmacy Private Limited ("Company"), as the operator of the platform, may collect from you ("You", "Your" or "User") through our website (www.merimedicines.in) or one or more mobile applications (the "App"). The Company, as the owner and operator of the Platform, is referred to as "We," "Us," or "Our" in this document. Our platform includes the facilitation of pharmaceutical purchases and third-party delivery services. This policy explains how We collect, use, process, disclose, and protect your information.

By clicking on "Continue" during the sign-up process, using Our Platform, or accessing Our Services, You confirm that You have read, understood, and agree to the privacy practices described in this Privacy Policy, as well as the Terms of Use (the "Terms"). This includes consent to the collection, storage, and processing of Your information in accordance with the Terms.
This Privacy Policy is incorporated by reference into the Terms. Any capitalized terms not defined within this Privacy Policy will carry the definitions provided in the Terms.
This Privacy Policy is published in compliance with:

items: Section 43A of the Information Technology Act, 2000 ("IT Act"),
Rule 4 of the Information Technology (Reasonable Security Practices and Procedures and Sensitive Personal Information) Rules, 2011 ("SPDI Rules"), and
Regulation 3(1) of the Information Technology (Intermediaries Guidelines and Digital Media Ethics Code) Rules, 2021 ("Intermediaries Guidelines").

By accessing or using the Meri Medicines Platform or Services, or by providing Us with Your information, You confirm that You have the legal capacity to enter into a binding contract under Indian law, specifically the Indian Contract Act, 1872. You also confirm that You have read, understood, and agreed to the practices and policies outlined in this Privacy Policy and agree to be bound by its terms.

You hereby consent to Our collection, use, sharing, and disclosure of Your information as described in this Privacy Policy. We reserve the right to update, modify, or amend portions of this Privacy Policy at Our sole discretion at any time. Your continued use of the Platform, App, or Services after such changes signifies implicit acceptance of the Privacy Policy in its amended form. We encourage You to review the Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed of any updates or modifications.
If You are accessing the Meri Medicines Site or Services from a location outside India, You do so at Your own risk and are responsible for compliance with applicable local laws.

If You do not agree with any terms of this Privacy Policy, please discontinue use of the Site, App, and Services immediately. This Privacy Policy may change periodically without notice, and You are encouraged to review it on the Site or App to stay updated.

sections.heading: 1. What Information About You is Collected on the Platform?
body: When You access the Site or the App or use the Service(s), You may provide, or We may collect, information that may specifically identify You or another individual. Below are the types of information that We may collect:

We receive and store any information You enter on Our Platform or provide to Us in other ways. When You register on the Site or App, We collect registration details, such as phone number, name, geographical address, and email address. Your phone number is verified with a one-time password sent to Your phone number. We also collect information required for providing Services on the Platform, including items You add to the cart, prescription drugs, over-the-counter (OTC) products ordered, and scheduling of consultations or diagnostic tests. Providing certain information is optional, but some features may be unavailable without it.

We may collect health information when You login on the Platform. This may include medical history, health records, diagnostic results, and other related information. Additionally, we may collect payment information, such as Your payment card number, expiration date, billing, and shipping address. By using the Service, You consent to the recording, storage, and disclosure of such communications.
We might receive details about You from other sources, such as partner companies or third parties registered on the Platform, to add to Our account information.

We use cookies and other tracking technologies to collect data on activity within the Site or App. You can adjust browser/mobile settings to control cookies; however, by blocking cookies, some Platform features may be limited.
The App may include third-party SDKs for payment processing and other tools to enhance the user experience.

Certain types of information are collected automatically when You interact with Us. For example, We collect information from Your browser about Your device, operating system, and usage patterns. Location data may also be used for internal analysis or to provide location-based services.

The IT Act and SPDI Rules regulate the collection, usage, and disclosure of SPDI (Sensitive Personal Data or Information) in India. SPDI may include any data that identifies a person and requires express consent for collection and disclosure.

You agree to provide all information, including SPDI, voluntarily, consenting to its use as described in this Privacy Policy. Refusing to provide SPDI may limit Your access to certain Platform features.

sections.heading: 2. How Do We Use the Information We Collect?
body: Meri Medicines uses the information collected on its platform in various ways to operate effectively, fulfill requests, and improve user experiences. Key uses include:
Fulfilling Service and Order Requests:

items: To process orders for products and services on the platform, ensuring timely delivery and quality of service.
To enable access to services such as consulting with medical practitioners and scheduling diagnostic tests.

body: Improving Platform and User Experience:

items: To analyze user interactions and trends, enabling optimization of the platform for a smoother, more efficient user experience.
Tracking and analyzing data for trend-building, recommendation engines, and database improvements to enhance functionality.

body: Research and Development:

items: Meri Medicines may use information to research and grow its business operations, including expanding partnerships and refining algorithms for better service offerings.

body: Customer Support and Communication:

items: To communicate with users, providing order updates, responding to queries, and notifying them about new products or services.
To conduct quality assessments, troubleshoot issues, and enhance product and service quality based on user feedback.

body: Marketing and Promotions:

items: Meri Medicines may use cookies and automated data to personalize user interactions, offering targeted promotions and advertisements.
Users may be contacted via SMS, email, or phone to complete purchases if they have items in their cart but haven't checked out.

body: Legal Compliance and Safety:

items: Information is used to comply with laws, audit processes, and ensure user safety. It may be used to prevent illegal activities and fraud or address legal obligations.

body: Aggregated and De-identified Data Usage:

items: Meri Medicines may aggregate and de-identify user data for marketing, research, and publication purposes, which allows for business insights without compromising personal information privacy.

body: Location-Based Services:

items: Location data helps confirm users' eligibility for certain services and assists in connecting them with nearby medical practitioners or relevant service providers.

sections.heading: 3. How Do We Share the Information We Collect?
body: Meri Medicines values user privacy and only shares personal information with third parties who adhere to protective data standards that meet or exceed those outlined in this Privacy Policy. Information sharing may occur in the following ways:
Retail and Service Partners:

items: Information is shared with affiliated retail partners, pharmacies, and medical practitioners to fulfill orders and deliver products. These partners, operating on the platform, receive only the necessary details for transaction purposes.

body: Third-Party Service Providers:

items: Certain personal information is shared with service providers for order fulfillment, diagnostic testing, logistics, and marketing support. These providers, such as labs and payment processors, handle data only to perform specific tasks in compliance with the Privacy Policy and applicable laws.

body: Legal Compliance:

items: Meri Medicines may disclose user information if legally required to comply with applicable laws, prevent crime, protect public or user safety, or enforce the terms of use. This may include sharing data with government entities for fraud prevention or credit risk reduction.

body: Business Transfers:

items: In the event of mergers, acquisitions, or transfers, Meri Medicines may share user information with third parties involved, who will then adhere to the current Privacy Policy to ensure data continuity and protection.

body: Internal Business Improvements:

items: Meri Medicines may use recorded consultations, e-prescriptions, and diagnostic reports to improve service quality, enhance marketing efforts, and customize user experiences. This data may be transferred to third parties, including those outside India, to help refine offerings, provided data protection standards are upheld.

body: International Data Transfers:

items: Subject to applicable law, Meri Medicines may transfer data to third parties, both within and outside India, ensuring comparable levels of data protection. By using the platform, users consent to such transfers, even to locations abroad, under protective compliance with Indian and international standards.

sections.heading: 4. How Secure Is Information About Me?
body: Security Measures:

items: Meri Medicines uses a combination of electronic, physical, and procedural safeguards to secure user data during its collection, storage, and disclosure.
The platform employs SSL encryption for secure transmission of information and follows internationally recognized Information Security Management System standards to protect stored data.

body: Access Control:

items: Access to personal data is restricted to employees and agents who need it to fulfill their roles. All are bound by strict confidentiality obligations and are subject to disciplinary actions for non-compliance.
Password security is strictly enforced: no employee or administrator can view user passwords, and users are encouraged to keep their passwords and devices secure by logging off after each session.

body: Incident Response and Liability:

items: Meri Medicines does not accept liability for unauthorized access resulting from weak password practices. If unauthorized use is suspected, users should immediately notify Meri Medicines via the provided contact details.
In certain situations, Meri Medicines may disclose data without prior user consent, such as when required by law or government agencies for legal investigations.
Meri Medicines is not responsible for security breaches outside its control, such as hacking, internet service issues, or unauthorized third-party access.

sections.heading: 5. What Information Can I Access?
body: Account and Activity Details:

items: Users can view a range of account and transaction-related information directly on the platform. In some cases, they may also modify or delete personal information.

body: Correction and Opt-Out Options:

items: Users can correct inaccuracies or deficiencies in their personal data where feasible. They also have options to opt-out of promotional communications and, if preferred, opt back in at a later time.

sections.heading: 6. Are Children Allowed to Use the Platform?

items: Age Restriction: The platform is intended only for individuals who are legally able to form binding contracts under the Indian Contract Act, 1872. Therefore, anyone under 18 is not permitted to use Meri Medicines.

Safeguards for Minors: If Meri Medicines identifies that someone under 18 has accessed its services or provided personally identifiable information, it will take action to delete that information. Parents or guardians who become aware that their child under 18 has accessed Meri Medicines can request data deletion by contacting the support team.
Nature of Third-Party Links: Meri Medicines may include links to external websites, applications, or resources, often hosted by other companies or advertisers.

Disclaimer of Responsibility: Meri Medicines does not control or endorse the content on these third-party sites. It is not liable for how these sites handle data collection, the accuracy of their materials, or any transactions made.
User Responsibility: Users are encouraged to use discretion, review third-party privacy policies, and exercise caution as they would with offline interactions.

Storage Locations: Meri Medicines retains personal information or Sensitive Personal Data or Information (SPDI) through trusted third-party cloud services, including Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud Platform, and MongoDB Cloud.

Data Destruction and Anonymization: SPDI will be destroyed or anonymized once it is no longer needed for its intended purpose or required by law. However, Meri Medicines may retain some information for business purposes, which may be anonymized and used for analytics or service delivery.

Withdrawal of Consent: Users can withdraw consent for processing their information by contacting Meri Medicines. However, this may affect service delivery, and uninstalling the app does not delete personal information.

User Access: Users can review and update their information by logging into their accounts. However, deletion of personal information is not permitted, and incorrect modifications may limit access to the platform.

Verification: Meri Medicines reserves the right to verify a user's identity to ensure accurate service delivery, and access to personal information may be restricted if it violates rights or applicable laws.

Grievance Redressal: Users with privacy concerns or grievances can contact Meri Medicines' grievance officer, Priya Menon, at the specified address and contact details. Meri Medicines commits to resolving grievances within one month of receipt.

Disclaimer: While Meri Medicines is committed to protecting your privacy, it cannot guarantee that your personal information and Sensitive Personal Data or Information (SPDI) will never be disclosed in ways not outlined in the privacy policy. Users acknowledge that they assume all responsibility and risk for their use of the platform and the information they post or access.

Indemnity: Users agree to indemnify Meri Medicines against any claims or disputes arising from their disclosure of information to third parties through the platform or elsewhere. Meri Medicines disclaims liability for actions by third parties regarding any personal information that users may have shared with them.
Severability: Each clause of the privacy policy is independent. If one clause is found to be null and void, it does not affect the validity of the remaining clauses.

termsAndConditions.heading: Terms & Conditions
body: This document ("Terms") is an electronic record in terms of Information Technology Act, 2000 and rules thereunder, as applicable and the amended provisions pertaining to electronic records in various statutes, as amended from time to time by the Information Technology Act, 2000. This electronic record is generated by a computer system and does not require any physical or digital signatures.

This document is published in accordance with the provisions of Rule 3(1) of the Information Technology (Intermediaries Guidelines and Digital Media Ethics Code) Rules, 2021 that requires publishing of the rules and regulations, privacy policy, and Terms for access or usage of www.merimedicines.in.

sections.heading: 1. General
body: The website www.merimedicines.in and the Meri Medicines mobile application (hereinafter collectively referred to as "Website") are operated and maintained by Meri Medicines Pharmacy Private Limited (hereinafter referred to as "Company," "We," "Our," or "Us"), a company duly incorporated under the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013.

For the purposes of these Terms, wherever the context requires, "You," "Your," or "User" shall mean any natural or legal person who accesses, uses, or subscribes to our Website, agrees to become a buyer on the Website, or avails or offers to avail any of our services.

Use of the Website is offered to You, subject to acceptance of all the terms, conditions, and notices contained in these Terms, including applicable policies which are incorporated herein by reference, along with any amendments/modifications made from time to time by the Company at its sole discretion and posted on the Website, including by way of imposing an additional charge for access to or use of a service(s).

The Company reserves the right to change or modify these Terms or any policy or guideline of the Website, including the Privacy Policy, at any time and in its sole discretion. Any changes or modifications will be effective immediately upon posting the revisions on the Website. You waive any right you may have to receive specific notice of such changes or modifications; provided, however, that We will inform You of such changes within the timelines specified under applicable laws. Your continued use of the Website will confirm Your acceptance of such changes or modifications; therefore, you should frequently review these Terms and applicable policies to understand the terms and conditions that apply to Your use of the Website.

By (i) using this Website or any facility or service provided by this Website in any way; or (ii) merely browsing the Website, You agree that You have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by these Terms, the Website's Privacy Policy, and such other rules, guidelines, policies, terms, and conditions as are relevant under the applicable laws in India and other jurisdictions for the purposes of accessing, browsing, or transacting on the Website or availing any of the Services. Such rules, guidelines, policies, terms, and conditions shall be deemed to be incorporated into and considered as part and parcel of these Terms.

Our Website is operated, and services are provided in compliance with the laws of India. The Company shall not be liable to deliver any Products or provide any Services purchased by You in locations outside India. If you access our services from locations outside India, you do so at your own risk and are solely liable for compliance with applicable local laws. The User agrees to use the service to authorize an individual and get the products from a third party on his/her behalf. Where you use any third-party website or the products or services of any third party, you may be subject to alternative or additional terms and conditions of use and privacy policies.

sections.heading: 2. Products and Services
body: The Website serves as a platform facilitating online requisition for the purchase of medicines and wellness or health-related products and services ("Products and Services"). These Products and Services are offered by various registered third parties, including but not limited to third-party retail pharmacies and labs (collectively referred to as "Retail Pharmacies"). Transactions for the sale and purchase of Products and Services between You and these Retail Pharmacies, as facilitated by your requisition on the Website, are governed by these Terms.

The Company provides hosting and technology intermediary services to Users browsing or visiting the Website. All items for sale, along with the content (including product descriptions, images, and related information) made available by the Retail Pharmacies, are considered third-party content. The Company does not control or originate this third-party content and assumes no responsibility for its authenticity, accuracy, or legality. The Retail Pharmacies bear sole responsibility for the authenticity and genuineness of the Products and Services they provide.

The Company does not guarantee the availability of any Products and Services displayed on the Website. In case of any discrepancies, such as out-of-stock items or changes in availability, the Company shall not be held liable. The content on the Website, including text, graphics, audio, and video, is for informational purposes only and does not constitute an advertisement, promotion of any specific drug, or professional medical advice.

To purchase prescription drugs, you must upload a scanned copy of a valid prescription on the Website. By submitting a prescription, you consent to the processing of your personal and health information as detailed in our Privacy Policy. If submitting on behalf of another individual, you affirm that you possess the authority to do so. The Retail Pharmacies will verify the prescription and may cancel the order if discrepancies are found.
The delivery of your order is outside the Company's control, and delays may occur.
Orders for alternate prescription drugs will only be processed under specific conditions, such as:

items: Approval by a registered medical practitioner for an equivalent generic drug.
The prescription lists active pharmaceutical ingredients instead of brand names, verified by a medical practitioner.

body: In cases of an invalid prescription or unavailability of prescribed drugs, you can:

items: Utilize online tele-consultancy with registered medical practitioners through our partner tele-consultation platform for alternate prescriptions.
Receive a call from a registered pharmacist with suggestions for alternate drugs, subject to verification by a medical practitioner.

body: All exchanges, including e-prescriptions, between medical practitioners, pharmacists, and you will be recorded for quality assurance and compliance monitoring. Such exchanges will be processed according to the Privacy Policy available on the Platform.

The listing of drugs and pharmaceutical products on the Website by Retail Pharmacies constitutes a mere invitation to an offer for sale, rather than an offer for sale. When you place an order, you make an offer to enter into an agreement with the Retail Pharmacies. Acceptance of this offer occurs only after the Retail Pharmacy validates the prescription (for prescription drugs) and confirms the availability of the product. If your offer is not accepted, the Company will notify you via SMS, email, or phone call. References to "offer" or "offered for sale" in these Terms should be understood as invitations to offer by the Retail Pharmacies.

sections.subheading: 2.5 Transfer of Property and Completion of Sale
body: Upon acceptance of your offer by the relevant Retail Pharmacy, the Products and Services will be dispensed at the pharmacy, following the order terms you placed. Dispensation will occur under the direct supervision of a licensed pharmacist, as required by law. You acknowledge that ownership of the Products and Services will transfer to you once they are dispensed and invoiced by the Retail Pharmacy. Consequently, the sale is completed at the Retail Pharmacy, which will issue the invoice for the Products and Services delivered to you.

Delivery of Products and Services will be executed by the Retail Pharmacies or independent contractors. You agree that the delivery personnel engaged by either the Retail Pharmacies or the Company act as your agent for delivering Products from the Retail Pharmacy to your specified address. The Company is facilitating this service and assumes no liability or responsibility for the delivery process.

The Company acts as a marketplace enabling users to access diagnostic tests offered by third-party labs through the Website. The labs are responsible for all aspects of the service, including sample collection, testing, and report generation. The Company does not bear any responsibility for these services and serves only to facilitate access to these labs. Both users and labs agree to use the Website in compliance with these Terms and applicable laws.

The Company retains the right to suspend lab or user access to the Website during investigations into complaints or violations of these Terms. Labs are solely responsible for their interactions with users, and the Company is not liable for any issues arising from these engagements.

sections.heading: 3. Eligibility of Use
body: Use of the Website is exclusively available to individuals who can form legally binding contracts in accordance with the Indian Contract Act, 1872. Individuals who are classified as "incompetent to contract," including but not limited to minors and undischarged insolvents, are prohibited from using the Website. Furthermore, users who have been suspended or removed from the Company's system for any reason will not be eligible to access the Products.

By accessing and using the Website, you affirm that you are of legal age to form a binding contract and are not barred from entering into a contract under applicable laws in India. If you are under eighteen (18) years of age, you may use the services provided on the Website only through a legal guardian in compliance with relevant laws. The Company reserves the right to terminate your membership or restrict your access to the Website if it is determined that you are under the age of eighteen.
You are permitted to have only one active Account on the Website. Selling, trading, or otherwise transferring your Account to another party is strictly prohibited.

sections.heading: 4. User Obligations

body.text: Usage Rights: Users receive a limited, non-exclusive right to access and use the website and services for lawful purposes only.

body: Prohibited Conduct: Users must not engage in various prohibited activities, such as:

items: Accessing the site through unauthorized means or automated tools.
Posting offensive or illegal content, infringing intellectual property rights, or violating privacy laws.
Disrupting the website's functionality or attempting to gain unauthorized access to its systems.

body: Monitoring and Reporting: Users acknowledge that the Company is not obligated to monitor content but reserves the right to review and remove any materials deemed inappropriate. There is also a process for users to report offensive content.

Limitations of Services: The Company disclaims responsibility for the quality of medical consultations provided by third-party practitioners, stressing that these services are not a substitute for in-person medical evaluations.
User Responsibilities: Users are solely responsible for ensuring their compliance with these terms and any consequences that arise from breaches.

sections.heading: 5. Use of Materials
body: Access Rights: You are granted a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable right to view, download, and print materials like product catalogs available on the website.
Restrictions:

items: Materials can only be used for personal, informational, and internal purposes.
Modifying, distributing, or selling the materials is prohibited.
You cannot remove any copyright or proprietary notices from the materials.
You do not have rights to the website's design or layout.
Copying or retransmitting materials is only allowed if expressly permitted.
Any software on the website is owned by the company or third parties, and usage is restricted unless permitted.

body: Purchasing Conditions: Any purchases made from the website are strictly for personal use. Reselling or using the products or services for commercial purposes is not allowed, and items cannot be transferred for profit.

sections.heading: 6. Usage Conduct
body: Equipment Responsibility: You are responsible for maintaining your own computer equipment and internet connection necessary to access the website.
Permissible Use: The website should only be used for reasonable and lawful purposes. Activities outside the intended use are prohibited.
Prescription Use: Prescriptions obtained through the website must be used exclusively for purchases via the site, not for fulfilling requirements from other retailers unless specified.

sections.heading: 7. Intellectual Property Rights
body: Ownership of Content: All content on the website (text, graphics, user interfaces, sounds, artwork, and computer code) is owned and controlled by the Company. This content is protected by copyright, patent, trademark laws, and other intellectual property rights.
Trademarks: The trademarks and logos displayed on the website belong to the Company or third-party partners. You cannot use these marks without prior consent.

Rights Reserved: The Company retains all intellectual property rights related to the trademark "Meri Medicines," its domain name, and the website itself, including various rights and interests in copyright, patents, trade secrets, and source code.
Restrictions on Use: You may not copy, republish, or distribute any content from the website without obtaining authorization from the Company or relevant third-party owners.

sections.heading: 8. Advertisements
body: Third-Party Advertisers: The Company may allow third-party advertisers to place ads on the website. These ads are clearly distinguished from editorial content and are not subject to the Company's editorial policies.
Advertiser Responsibilities: Third-party advertisers must be truthful about their products or services, avoid misleading content, and comply with consumer protection standards.

Modification Rights: The Company reserves the right to modify or remove any content or advertisements without prior notice. Advertisers must keep their advertisements compliant with applicable laws and regulations.
Liability Disclaimer: The Company is not liable for any issues arising from third-party advertisements and can reject or request modifications to any ad.

sections.heading: 9. Editorial Policy
body: Informational Purpose: The editorial content on the website is provided for informational purposes only and does not constitute professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Users are encouraged to read the editorial policy carefully.

sections.heading: 10. Disclaimer of Warranties and Liabilities
body: "As Is" Basis: The website and services are provided "as is" without any warranties, either express or implied. This includes disclaimers regarding the website's reliability, accuracy, or that it will meet users' expectations.

Limitations on Liability: The Company disclaims liability for user-generated content and is not responsible for unauthorized use of accounts or any resulting losses. It also does not guarantee the accuracy or completeness of information on the site and is not liable for issues arising from website unavailability or technical problems.

Third-Party Products: The Company is not liable for any third-party products or services, and the advertisements related to these are for informational purposes only. Users agree to use the website at their own risk.

sections.heading: 11. Indemnification and Limitation of Liability
body: Indemnification: Users agree to indemnify the Company against any losses or claims arising from their breach of terms or from third-party claims related to their use of the website.

Limitations on Liability: The Company's liability is limited to the refund of the amount paid for specific products or services. It is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or punitive damages arising from the use of the website. The Company does not assume any responsibility for transactions between users and third-party service providers and will not mediate disputes between them.

sections.heading: 12. Violation of Terms
body: Termination of Access: The Company reserves the right to terminate a user's access to the website without prior notice if it determines that the user has violated the Terms.

Consequences of Violation: Any violation by the user is considered an unlawful business practice, potentially causing irreparable harm to the Company. The Company can seek injunctive relief in such cases.

Reasons for Termination: The Company may terminate access for reasons including but not limited to law enforcement requests, user-initiated account deletions, service discontinuation, and technical issues. Users may also be responsible for legal fees incurred by the Company in case of violations.

sections.heading: 13. Termination
body: Ongoing Agreement: The Terms remain effective until terminated by either party.
User-Initiated Termination: Users can terminate the agreement by not accessing the website or closing their accounts.

Company-Initiated Termination: The Company can terminate the Terms at any time for reasons such as user breaches, legal obligations, or commercial viability. Upon termination, the Company may remove user access and delete account information.
Survival of Terms: The Terms will survive indefinitely unless terminated by the Company.

sections.heading: 14. Governing Law
body: Jurisdiction: The Terms are governed by Indian law, and disputes will be resolved in the courts of Mumbai, India.

sections.heading: 15. Report Abuse / Grievance Redressal
body: Reporting Violations: Users can report any abuse or objectionable content to the Company's customer support.
Grievance Officer: Users can contact Priya Menon for concerns regarding the Terms or grievances about the website.

sections.heading: 16. Privacy Policy
body: Data Collection: The Company collects and processes user data according to its Privacy Policy, which is designed to protect user information.

sections.heading: 17. Communications
body: User Consent: Users consent to receive communications from the Company, overriding any previous opt-out preferences related to telemarketing regulations.
Unsubscribing: Users can opt out of communications at any time through the website or by using unsubscribe links in emails.

notFound.heading: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
